The field for the id record component.
id - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Unique notification identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Unique request identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Unique park identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Unique reservation identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.UserDTO
Unique user identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Unique visit identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
National-ID-style visitor identifier (primary key).
id - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Unique waiting-list entry identifier (primary key).

Returns the value of the id record component.

Returns the value of the id record component.

Returns the value of the id record component.
id() - Method in record class client.view.VisitsReportController.ParkOption
Returns the value of the id record component.
idField - Variable in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Guide national-id input.
idField - Variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Subscriber national-id input.
in - Variable in class client.net.ClientConnection
Object input stream, read by the reader thread.
in - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
Object input stream for reading requests.
INDIVIDUAL - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.VisitType
A single, unaccompanied visitor.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
FXML lifecycle hook: loads the pending queue.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
FXML lifecycle hook: sets default dates, the y-axis, and loads parks.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
FXML lifecycle hook: greets the actor and renders the role-specific view.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.GateController
FXML lifecycle hook: configures the inputs and the Entry/Exit toggle.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
FXML lifecycle hook: builds the role-filtered sidebar and user chrome.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
FXML lifecycle hook: loads the actor's notifications.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
FXML lifecycle hook: fills the field dropdown and loads the manager's park.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
FXML lifecycle hook: loads parks, configures inputs, prefills for a visitor.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
FXML lifecycle hook: wires the input, prefills for a visitor, loads park names.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
FXML lifecycle hook: configures the family-size spinner.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
FXML lifecycle hook: wires the tabs, server fields, and dev quick-login.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.VisitsReportController
FXML lifecycle hook: sets default dates, fixes the chart categories, loads parks.
initialize() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
FXML lifecycle hook: starts the offer feed, countdown, and initial load.
initialsOf(String) - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
First letters of the first two name tokens, e.g.
inputStyle() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the inline CSS for a text input.
insert(ReservationDTO) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Inserts a new reservation, letting the database assign the auto-increment id.
insert(Long, Integer, String, String) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Inserts a new notification, letting the database assign the auto-increment id and stamp created_at.
insertEntry(int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Inserts a new queue entry for a WAITING reservation, letting the database stamp queued_at = NOW() and leaving the offer columns (grab_offered_at/grab_expires_at) NULL until a slot is offered via WaitlistDAO.markOffered(int, java.lang.String).
insertRequest(int, int, ParamField, int, int) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Inserts a new change request in the PENDING state, stamping created_at with the current time.
insertVisit(Integer, int, Long, int, VisitType, Integer) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Records a new (open) visit, letting the database stamp entered_at and leaving exited_at NULL.
INSTANCE - Static variable in class client.net.EventBus
The singleton instance.
INSTANCE - Static variable in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
The singleton instance.
instantiate(Class<?>) - Method in class client.app.Navigator
Constructs a controller class via reflection, picking a constructor that takes (NetworkService, Session, Navigator) if available, otherwise the (NetworkService, Session) or no-arg form.
ip - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
The client's IP address.
ipProperty() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
The client's IP address.
isAcknowledged() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns true if this notification has been acknowledged (read) by the recipient.
isCapacityFailure(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Whether a failed CREATE_RESERVATION was rejected specifically for lack of capacity (the only case that offers the waiting list).
isClosed() - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Returns whether the socket is unset or closed.
isConnected() - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Returns true if the underlying socket is connected and not closed.
isConnected() - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Returns whether the session already holds a live server connection..
isGroup - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Whether this booking is treated as an organised group.
isGroup() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns whether the booking is treated as an organised group.
isLegalTransition(ReservationStatus, ReservationStatus) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
The reservation state machine: whether a reservation may move from its current status to target.
isLoggedIn() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns true if any identity (staff or visitor) is logged in.
isOfferActive(WaitlistEntryDTO) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Whether an entry's grab offer is still live: it has been offered and its expiry is in the future.
isOffered(WaitlistEntryDTO) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
True when the entry currently holds a parseable grab offer (offered + has an expiry).
isPaidInAdvance() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns whether the reservation was paid for in advance.
isServiceRep(ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.AuthController
Server-side authorization gate for member/guide registration: resolves the connection's logged-in actor to a SERVICE_REP.
isStaff() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns true if a staff user is logged in.
isSubscriber - Variable in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Whether this visitor holds a subscription.
isSubscriber() - Method in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Returns whether the visitor holds a subscription.
isSuccess() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService.ProbeResult
Returns true if the probe connected and the server replied success.
isSuccess() - Method in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Returns whether the operation succeeded.
isValidEmail(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Basic client-side email check (non-blank, contains an '@' and a '.') mirroring the server's isValidEmail.
isValidEmail(String) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Basic server-side email sanity check for the booking contact: non-blank and containing both an '@' and a '.'.
isValidPhone(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Basic client-side phone check (at least ten digits, ignoring formatting) mirroring the server's isValidPhone.
isValidPhone(String) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Basic server-side phone check for the booking contact: it must carry at least ten digits (a national mobile number's worth), ignoring any formatting such as dashes, spaces, parentheses or a leading '+'.
isVisitor() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns true if a visitor is logged in.
